mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_META (FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_PATH, CONTENT_TYPE, SIZE_BYTES, UPLOADED_BY) VALUES (#{FILE_ID}, #{ORIGINAL_NAME}, #{STORED_PATH}, #{CONTENT_TYPE}, #{SIZE_BYTES}, #{UPLOADED_BY})
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_PATH, CONTENT_TYPE, SIZE_BYTES, UPLOADED_BY, UPLOADED_AT FROM FILE_META WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND DELETED = FALSE
SELECT FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_PATH, CONTENT_TYPE, SIZE_BYTES, UPLOADED_BY, UPLOADED_AT FROM FILE_META WHERE DELETED = FALSE ORDER BY UPLOADED_AT DESC

SELECT FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_PATH, CONTENT_TYPE, SIZE_BYTES, UPLOADED_BY, UPLOADED_AT FROM FILE_META WHERE DELETED = FALSE AND FILE_ID IN
#{id}
